caption: Isobaric vapor-liquid equilibria of methanol-1-octanol at P=1.013 bar.

digitization_uncertainty.notes: Uncertainty reflects solid-line thickness and overlap with Arce et al. 1995 markers, especially on the high-methanol dew branch.

limitations: The retained source basis targets the paper's solid PC-SAFT line rather than the nearby filled experimental markers.
The steep high-methanol dew-end segment is visually ambiguous in the crop, so the retained points stop before the near-vertical endpoint cluster.

curve_identity.bubble_curve: lower PC-SAFT solid branch using liquid methanol mole fraction x_methanol
curve_identity.dew_curve: upper PC-SAFT solid branch using vapor methanol mole fraction y_methanol

provenance.digitization_basis: manual calibrated digitization of the retained PC-SAFT solid curves in Figure 9
